comparability.hle_text_only: inference input only; not directly comparable with M2RL full-HLE results
comparability.ifbench: paper-aligned benchmark data; prompt-level scoring must match the selected strict/loose protocol
comparability.ifeval: paper-aligned benchmark data; strict prompt scoring

limitations: HLE is restricted to text-only rows because the OPD Qwen3-4B evaluation path is text-only.
HLE output is inference-only: current verl rewards do not implement the official exact-match/judge protocol.
Do not add HLE_text_only_inference.parquet to verl val_files or compare it with M2RL full-HLE scores.
protocol: M2RL paper benchmark families: IF={IFEval, IFBench}; Science={HLE, GPQA-Diamond}
